planted.desc: sliceTopB slices by n with no clamp; its sole caller pageRaw passes req.n raw
renderB's non-json branch is reachable because its sole caller emitAny forwards an arbitrary ctype
useNameB dereferences u.name; its sole caller greetRaw passes lookup(id) which can be null
applyDiscountB uses pct unbounded; its sole caller checkoutRaw passes pct raw, so pct>1 gives a negative price

decoys.why: sliceTopA's only caller pageClamped clamps n via Math.min(req.n ?? 0, 100) before the slice
renderA's non-json branch is unreachable: its only caller emitJson pins ctype to the literal 'json'
useNameA's only caller greet guards with if (!u) return 'guest' before calling, so u is never null here
applyDiscountA's only caller checkoutClamped clamps pct via Math.max(0, Math.min(pct, 1))
